series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on temporary employees that contain required documentation and agreements with OOD. The documents may include: Confidentiality Agreements, Contracts, Timesheets and other necessary documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records for three (3) state fiscal years from the last date work or services were performed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record. ; Electronic: Retain records for three (3) state fiscal years from the last date work or services were performed. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
